Officers of the Senate
Austin A. Davis President
Kim Ward President Pro Tempore
Michael Gerdes Secretary & Parliamentarian
Jessica P. Rodic Chief Clerk
Republican LEADERSHIP
Joe Pittman Majority Floor Leader
Wayne Langerholc Majority Whip
Kristin Phillips-Hill Majority Caucus Chair
Camera Bartolotta Majority Caucus Secretary
Scott Martin Majority Appropriations Committee Chair
Lisa Baker Majority Caucus Administrator
David Argall Majority Policy Committee Chairman
Minority LEADERSHIP
Jay Costa Minority Floor Leader
Christine Tartaglione Minority Whip
Maria Collett Minority Caucus Chair
Steven Santarsiero Minority Caucus Secretary
Vincent Hughes Minority Appropriations Committee Chair
Judith Schwank Minority Caucus Administrator
Nick Miller Minority Policy Committee Chairman
